x-enumeration-literals.name: CustomerCancel
x-enumeration-literals.description: Customer cancellation, for example removing the card before the end of the transaction.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Malfunction
x-enumeration-literals.description: Suspected malfunction.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Partial
x-enumeration-literals.description: Completed partially.

x-enumeration-literals.name: TooLateResponse
x-enumeration-literals.description: Response to the previous message was received too late.

x-enumeration-literals.name: UnableToComplete
x-enumeration-literals.description: Unable to complete the transaction after the authorisation response.

x-enumeration-literals.name: UnableToSend
x-enumeration-literals.description: Unable to deliver the request message to the recipient party.

x-enumeration-literals.name: TimeOut
x-enumeration-literals.description: Timeout while waiting for a response to a request message, or no response was received (for example connection release before receiving the response).

x-enumeration-literals.name: CardDeclined
x-enumeration-literals.description: Integrated circuit card declines the transaction before or after the authorisation.

x-enumeration-literals.name: OnLineDeclined
x-enumeration-literals.description: Online authorisation declined the transaction.

x-enumeration-literals.name: OfflineDeclined
x-enumeration-literals.description: Offline authorisation declined the transaction.

x-enumeration-literals.name: SuspectedFraud
x-enumeration-literals.description: Card payment transaction fails because the merchant suspect a fraud.

x-enumeration-literals.name: SecurityError
x-enumeration-literals.description: Security error has occurred in the authorisation response message sent by the acquirer.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CardCaptured
x-enumeration-literals.description: ATM manager has requested to capture the card.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CardError
x-enumeration-literals.description: Unable to complete transaction with the card.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CustomerDecline
x-enumeration-literals.description: Customer has declined additional fees or a lower amount, transaction fails.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ForgottenCard
x-enumeration-literals.description: Customer has left the card in the ATM or a motorised card reader.

x-enumeration-literals.name: FullfilmentError
x-enumeration-literals.description: Unable to fulfil, for instance dispensing the cash.

x-enumeration-literals.name: OutOfCustomerService
x-enumeration-literals.description: ATM manager has requested to the ATM to stop customer services.

x-enumeration-literals.name: UnableToCapture
x-enumeration-literals.description: Unable to capture the card as requested.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Security
x-enumeration-literals.description: General security error.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Hardware
x-enumeration-literals.description: Hardware error on the device.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Compromised
x-enumeration-literals.description: Key is compromised.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Expired
x-enumeration-literals.description: Key has expired.

x-enumeration-literals.name: InvalidKCV
x-enumeration-literals.description: Key check value is incorrect.

x-enumeration-literals.name: KeyLoadError
x-enumeration-literals.description: Error during the key download in the security device.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CardRetained
x-enumeration-literals.description: Card has been retained by the ATM or the terminal.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CustomerTimeOut
x-enumeration-literals.description: Customer has not been performed in time an action.
